description: CompositionBlack jeggings made of 73% cotton, 24% polyester and 3% spandex, with a faded look, waist elasticated at the back and two back pockets with embroideryFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironWith the look of jeans and style of leggings, these jeggings from jealous 21 are a great addition to any woman's wardrobe. The faded look adds to the style statement, while the elasticated waist fits snugly. Team this with a stylish top and comfortable footwear from the wide range at myntra, and you are all set to rule the road in style.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
